mapper.select: SELECT id, plate_number, pass_result, camera_id, camera_name, recognized_at FROM plate_records ORDER BY recognized_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, plate_number, pass_result, camera_id, camera_name, recognized_at FROM plate_records WHERE recognized_at >= #{since} ORDER BY recognized_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plate_records WHERE DATE(recognized_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT id, plate_number, pass_result, camera_id, camera_name, recognized_at FROM plate_records WHERE plate_number = #{plateNumber} ORDER BY recognized_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plate_records (plate_number, pass_result, camera_id, camera_name, recognized_at) VALUES (#{plateNumber}, #{passResult}, #{cameraId}, #{cameraName}, #{recognizedAt})
